statement: In every magma, Equation 600 (`x = y * (z * (w * (z * z)))`) implies Equation 357 (`x * y = z * (w * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0679
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op w (op z z))))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op w w))
